name: Bad (good) Ending Party: Merry Christmas
description:
It's Christmas, and your two adventurer friends have thought about giving you a real special gift this year...

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe and Rei are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe, Rei and you are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. Ashe and Rei both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

Who are you (pov)?:

Of course I didn't specify anything about you, only that you are close friends to Ashe and Rei.

Pov's:

•MalePov

•FemalePov

(And these are basically the ones that should always work, you can of course experiment around.)

__________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

It may happen that the bot talks or acts for you. In case that should happen, then it's JLLM fuckery. Just try to edit the part out where the bot does that or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

_______________________

"(OOC: Avoid talking or acting for {{user}})" Would be one way. Just put it at the end of your message.

_______________________

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:

https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

___________________________________________________

Choose your rank (?):

(I mean, your rank won't really matter in this roleplay, but I guess Imma just keep including this lol)

I added more ranks to the story, so this is not Canon. Adventurers are categorized into 8 ranks by the adventurer guild. I recommend you to manage your rank in your per
creator: Ju_jun
